entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The target crop species used for anther and microspore culture studies.

entities.name: ANTHER CULTURE
entities.description: The process of culturing anthers to induce androgenic response and callus formation.

entities.name: MICROSPORE CULTURE
entities.description: The process of culturing microspores to induce androgenic response and callus formation.

entities.name: CALLUS INDUCTION
entities.description: The process of inducing the formation of an unorganized mass of cells called callus.

entities.name: MS MEDIUM
entities.description: Murashige and Skoog medium used as a growth medium for cultures.

entities.name: B5 MEDIUM
entities.description: Gamborg B5 medium used as a growth medium for cultures.

entities.name: N6 MEDIUM
entities.description: N6 medium used as a growth medium for cultures.

entities.name: KINETIN
entities.description: A cytokinin used to stimulate cell division and increase androgenic response.

entities.name: NAA
entities.description: Naphthaleneacetic acid, an auxin used to induce cell division.

entities.name: 2,4-D
entities.description: 2,4-Dichlorophenoxyacetic acid, an auxin used to induce cell division.

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The environmental temperature, with 26°C being the most effective for response.

entities.name: SUCROSE
entities.description: A carbon source used to induce cell divisions in microspores.

entities.name: MALTOSE
entities.description: A carbon source used to induce cell divisions in microspores.

entities.name: UNINUCLEATE MICROSPORES
entities.description: Microspores at the single-nucleus stage, which showed the highest cell division.

entities.name: BINUCLEATE MICROSPORES
entities.description: Microspores at the two-nucleus stage, which showed no androgenic response.

entities.name: CELL DIVISION
entities.description: The process of cell multiplication observed in microspore cultures.

entities.name: CSH 9
entities.description: A sorghum hybrid showing a 60% callus induction frequency.

entities.name: CSH 5
entities.description: A sorghum hybrid showing a 20-30% callus induction frequency.

entities.name: CSH 12R
entities.description: A sorghum hybrid showing a 15-20% callus induction frequency.

entities.name: GENOTYPE
entities.description: The genetic constitution of the sorghum hybrids affecting the culture response.
